protocol.name: wlr_layer_shell_unstable_v1
protocol.copyright:
Copyright 2017 Drew DeVault
Permission to use, copy, modify, distribute, and sell this software and its documentation for any purpose is hereby granted without fee, provided that the above copyright notice appear in all copies and that both that copyright notice and this permission notice appear in supporting documentation.

interface.name: xdg_popup

description.summary: minimal xdg_popup declaration for protocol generation

interface.description: This project does not create popups, but layer-shell v1 includes a get_popup request that references xdg_popup. Declaring the interface keeps generated request opcodes compatible without vendoring full xdg-shell.

interface.name: zwlr_layer_shell_v1

description.summary: create surfaces that are layers of the desktop

interface.description: Clients can use this interface to assign the surface_layer role to wl_surfaces. Such surfaces are rendered above or below normal application windows by the compositor and can reserve exclusive screen space.

interface.name: zwlr_layer_surface_v1
interface.description: An interface that may be implemented by a wl_surface for surfaces that should be placed into a compositor layer.
